message:
fix: classify fs errors as 400, add security tests

- Filesystem errors (EISDIR, ENOENT, EEXIST, ENOTEMPTY, EINVAL) now
  return 400 with the error message instead of generic 500. These are
  client errors (bad input), not server errors.
- Unexpected internal errors still return sanitized "Internal server
  error" to avoid leaking details.
- Add 5 security tests: unlink directory rejection, rename-into-self
  rejection, ReDoS regex fallback, which no-args, error sanitization.
